cdif.bbr.metadata.ddiProperties.ddicdiDa.title: DDI-CDI Data Types
cdif.bbr.metadata.ddiProperties.ddicdiDa.description: Shared DDI-CDI structured data types from DDICDILibrary/DataTypes. Provides reusable $defs for identifiers, names, contact information, references, and other common DDI-CDI structured data types.

id-reference.description: JSON-LD @id reference to a node defined elsewhere in the graph

@id.description: IRI or blank node identifier of the referenced node

cdi:context.description: Context or usage of this name
Context or usage of this name

cdi:effectiveDates.description: Date range when this name is/was effective

cdi:isFormal.description: Whether this is the formal/legal name

cdi:typeOfOrganizationName.description: Classification of this name (e.g. legal, trade, acronym)

cdi:fullName.description: Full name as a single internationalized string

cdi:isFormal.description: Whether this is a formal name

cdi:isPreferred.description: Whether this is the preferred name

cdi:effectiveDates.description: Date range when this name is/was effective

cdi:context.description: Context or usage of this name

cdi:typeOfIndividualName.description: Classification of this name (e.g. birth, married, pen)

cdi:sex.description: Sex specification associated with this name

cdi:languageSpecificString.description: The label text with language tag

cdi:typeOfAddress.description: Type of address (e.g. home, work, mailing)

cdi:isPreferred.description: Whether this is the preferred address
Whether this is the preferred email

cdi:typeOfTelephone.description: Type of telephone (e.g. mobile, office, fax)

cdi:isPreferred.description: Whether this is the preferred telephone
Whether this is the preferred website

cdi:typeOfService.description: Type of messaging service (e.g. Slack, Teams)

cdi:isPreferred.description: Whether this is the preferred messaging service

AccessLocation.description: DDI-CDI access location for a machine (dt-AccessLocation)

cdi:mimeType.description: MIME type of the resource at this location

cdi:effectiveDates.description: Date range when this image is effective

ControlledVocabularyEntry.description: DDI-CDI controlled vocabulary entry (dt-ControlledVocabularyEntry). Allows for unstructured content which may be an entry from an externally maintained controlled vocabulary. When the content is from a controlled vocabulary, provide the code value of the entry along with a reference to the vocabulary from which the value is taken.

cdi:entryReference.description: A reference to the specific item in the vocabulary referenced by cdi:vocabulary, using a URI or other resolvable identifier.

cdi:entryValue.description: The value of the entry of the controlled vocabulary. If no controlled vocabulary is used the term is entered here and none of the properties defining the controlled vocabulary location are used.

cdi:name.description: The name of the code list (controlled vocabulary).

cdi:valueForOther.description: If the value of the string is "Other" or the equivalent from the codelist, this attribute can provide a more specific value not found in the codelist.

cdi:vocabulary.description: A reference to the external controlled vocabulary, using a URI or other resolvable identifier.

PairedControlledVocabularyEntry.description: DDI-CDI tightly-bound pair of controlled vocabulary entries (dt-PairedControlledVocabularyEntry). The extent property describes the extent to which the parent term applies for the specific case.

cdi:term.description: The term attributed to the parent class (e.g. the role of a contributor).

cdi:extent.description: Extent to which the parent term applies for the specific case. When paired with a CASRAI Contributor Role, typical values are "lead", "equal", or "supporting".

cdi:language.description: ISO language code (e.g. en, fr, de)

CorrespondenceDefinition.description: DDI-CDI CorrespondenceDefinition (dt-CorrespondenceDefinition). Describes the commonalities and differences between two members using textual descriptions plus an optional coding of the type of match.

cdi:commonality.description: A description of the common features of the two items.

cdi:commonalityCode.description: Commonality expressed as a term or code. Supports the use of an external controlled vocabulary. Ordered; repeat to cite multiple vocabularies.

cdi:difference.description: A description of the differences between the two items.

cdi:matching.description: The type of match between the two items (MatchingCriterion).

StructureSpecification.description: DDI-CDI StructureSpecification (dt-StructureSpecification). The mathematical properties of a structure — whether the member relationship is reflexive, symmetric, and/or transitive over the members in scope.

cdi:reflexive.description: Whether members are related to themselves (MemberRelationshipScope).

cdi:symmetric.description: Whether the member relationship is symmetric (MemberRelationshipScope).

cdi:transitive.description: Whether the member relationship is transitive (MemberRelationshipScope).

cdif.bbr.metadata.skosProperties.skosCon.title: SKOS Concept
cdif.bbr.metadata.skosProperties.skosCon.description: JSON Schema for a SKOS Concept in JSON-LD form. A unit of thought within a concept scheme. Supports labels (prefLabel, altLabel, hiddenLabel), notations, hierarchical relations (broader/narrower), associative relations (related), cross-scheme mapping properties, scheme membership, and documentary notes. Based on the W3C SKOS Reference (https://www.w3.org/TR/skos-reference/).

@context.description: JSON-LD context declaring the skos namespace prefix. May be a single object or an array of strings and objects.

skos:prefLabel.description: Preferred lexical label for this concept. A single string, a single language-tagged value, or an array of language-tagged values. Each language should appear at most once.

skos:hiddenLabel.description: Labels accessible to free-text search but not displayed.

skos:notation.description: Classification code for this concept within a scheme.

skos:definition.description: Formal explanation of the meaning of this concept.

skos:scopeNote.description: Note clarifying meaning and/or intended use.

skos:historyNote.description: Note about past state or use.

skos:example.description: Example of use of this concept.

skos:inScheme.description: Concept scheme(s) this concept belongs to.

skos:topConceptOf.description: Concept scheme(s) for which this is a top concept.

skos:broader.description: Broader (parent) concepts in the hierarchy. Items are inline concept objects or @id references.

skos:narrower.description: Narrower (child) concepts in the hierarchy. Items are inline concept objects or @id references.

skos:exactMatch.description: Concepts in other schemes with equivalent meaning.

skos:closeMatch.description: Concepts in other schemes with similar meaning.

ConceptRef.description: A reference to a SKOS Concept by URI.

LanguageTaggedValue.description: An RDF literal value with a language tag, serialized as a JSON-LD value object.

@language.description: BCP 47 language tag (e.g. en, fr, de).

cdif.bbr.metadata.ddiProperties.ddicdiAg.title: DDI-CDI Agent
cdif.bbr.metadata.ddiProperties.ddicdiAg.description: DDI-CDI Agent class hierarchy. Covers Individual (person), Machine (software/hardware), Organization (group/institution), and ProcessingAgent (orchestrates production activities) using DDI Cross-Domain Integration vocabulary. Each agent subtype is defined in its own building block; this schema composes them.

cdif.bbr.metadata.ddiProperties.ddicdiIn.title: DDI-CDI Individual
cdif.bbr.metadata.ddiProperties.ddicdiIn.description: DDI-CDI Individual agent (cls-Individual, extends Agent). Represents a person with name, contact information, and identification.

cdi:purpose.description: Purpose or role of this agent

cdif.bbr.metadata.ddiProperties.ddicdiMa.title: DDI-CDI Machine
cdif.bbr.metadata.ddiProperties.ddicdiMa.description: DDI-CDI Machine agent (cls-Machine, extends Agent). Represents software or hardware with access location, function, and interface specifications.

cdi:accessLocation.description: Network or physical access point for this machine

cdi:ownerOperatorContact.description: Contact information for the owner or operator

cdi:purpose.description: Purpose or role of this agent

cdif.bbr.metadata.ddiProperties.ddicdiOr.title: DDI-CDI Organization
cdif.bbr.metadata.ddiProperties.ddicdiOr.description: DDI-CDI Organization agent (cls-Organization, extends Agent). Represents a group or institution with structured name, contact information, and identification.

cdi:purpose.description: Purpose or role of this agent

cdif.bbr.metadata.ddiProperties.ddicdiPr.title: DDI-CDI ProcessingAgent
cdif.bbr.metadata.ddiProperties.ddicdiPr.description: DDI-CDI ProcessingAgent (cls-ProcessingAgent, extends Agent). Orchestrates production activities, linking agents to the activities they perform and environments they operate on.

@id.description: Identifier for this processing agent node

cdi:performs.description: Activities this agent performs (cdi:Activity). Use @id references to Activity nodes defined elsewhere in the graph.

cdi:operatesOn.description: Production environments this agent operates on (cdi:ProductionEnvironment)

cdi:purpose.description: Purpose or role of this agent

cdi:difference.description: A description of the differences between the two items.

title: DDI-CDI Enumeration Domain
description: A base class acting as an extension point to allow all codifications (codelist, statistical classification, etc.) to be understood as enumerated value domains.

cdi:identifier.description: Identifier for objects requiring short- or long-lasting referencing and management.

cdi:name.description: Human understandable name (liguistic signifier, word, phrase, or mnemonic). May follow ISO/IEC 11179-5 naming principles, and have context provided to specify usage.

cdi:purpose.description: Intent or reason for the object/the description of the object.

AuthorizationSource.description: Identifies the authorizing agency and allows for the full text of the authorization (law, regulation, or other form of authorization).

cdi:identifier.description: Identifier for objects requiring short- or long-lasting referencing and management.

cdi:legalMandate.description: Provide a legal citation to a law authorizing the study/data collection. For example, a legal citation for a law authorizing a country's census.

cdi:purpose.description: Intent or reason for the object/the description of the object.

cdi:statementOfAuthorization.description: Text of the authorization (law, mandate, approved business case).

Category.description: Concept whose role is to define and measure a characteristic.

cdi:descriptiveText.description: A short natural language account of the characteristics of the object.

cdi:definition.description: Natural language statement conveying the meaning of a concept, differentiating it from other concepts. Supports the use of multiple languages and structured text. 'externalDefinition' can't be used if 'definition' is used.

cdi:displayLabel.description: A human-readable display label for the object. Supports the use of multiple languages. Repeat for labels with different content, for example, labels with differing length limitations.

cdi:externalDefinition.description: A reference to an external definition of a concept (that is, a concept which is described outside the content of the DDI-CDI metadata description). An example is a SKOS concept. The definition property is assumed to duplicate the external one referenced if externalDefinition is used. Other corresponding properties are assumed to be included unchanged if used.

cdi:identifier.description: Identifier for objects requiring short- or long-lasting referencing and management.

cdi:name.description: Human understandable name (linguistic signifier, word, phrase, or mnemonic). May follow ISO/IEC 11179-5 naming principles, and have context provided to specify usage.

CategoryPosition.description: Assigns a sequence number to a category within a list.

cdi:identifier.description: Identifier for objects requiring short- or long-lasting referencing and management.

cdi:value.description: Index value of the member in an ordered array.

CategorySet.description: Concept system where the underlying concepts are categories.

cdi:allowsDuplicates.description: If value is False, the members are unique within the collection - if True, there may be duplicates. (Note that a mathematical “bag” permits duplicates and is unordered - a “set” does not have duplicates and may be ordered.)

cdi:externalDefinition.description: A reference to an external definition of a concept (that is, a concept which is described outside the content of the DDI-CDI metadata description). An example is a SKOS concept. The definition property is assumed to duplicate the external one referenced if externalDefinition is used. Other corresponding properties are assumed to be included unchanged if used.

cdi:identifier.description: Identifier for objects requiring short- or long-lasting referencing and management.

cdi:name.description: Human understandable name (liguistic signifier, word, phrase, or mnemonic). May follow ISO/IEC 11179-5 naming principles, and have context provided to specify usage.

cdi:purpose.description: Intent or reason for the object/the description of the object.

ClassificationItem.description: A space for a category within a statistical classification.

cdi:changeFromPreviousVersion.description: Describes the changes, which the item has been subject to from the previous version to the actual statistical classification.

cdi:changeLog.description: Describes the changes, which the item has been subject to during the life time of the actual statistical classification.

cdi:explanatoryNotes.description: A classification item may be associated with explanatory notes, which further describe and clarify the contents of the category. Explanatory notes consist of: General note: Contains either additional information about the category, or a general description of the category, which is not structured according to the "includes", "includes also", "excludes" pattern. Includes: Specifies the contents of the category. Includes also: A list of borderline cases, which belong to the described category. Excludes: A list of borderline cases, which do not belong to the described category. Excluded cases may contain a reference to the classification items to which the excluded cases belong.

cdi:futureNotes.description: The future events describe an intended or implemented change (or a number of changes) related to an invalid item (e.g., these changes may have turned the now invalid item into one or several successor items). This allows for the possibility of following successors of the item in the future.

cdi:identifier.description: Identifier for objects requiring short- or long-lasting referencing and management.

cdi:isGenerated.description: Indicates whether or not the item has been generated to make the level to which it belongs complete.

cdi:isValid.description: Indicates whether or not the item is currently valid. If updates are allowed in the Statistical Classification, an item may be restricted in its validity, i.e. it may become valid or invalid after the Statistical Classification has been released.

cdi:name.description: Human understandable name (liguistic signifier, word, phrase, or mnemonic). May follow ISO/IEC 11179-5 naming principles, and have context provided to specify usage. A Classification Item has an official name as provided by the owner or maintenance unit. The name describes the content of the category. The name is unique within the Statistical Classification to which the item belongs, except for categories that are identical at more than one level in a hierarchical classification. Use the context attribute to differentiate official names or alternate names for the Classification Item.

cdi:validDates.description: The dates describing the validity period of the object. The date from which the object became valid must be defined if the map belongs to a "floating" construct. The date at which the object became invalid must be defined if the map belongs to a "floating" construct and is no longer valid.

Level.description: Set of all classification items the same number of relationships from the root (or top) classification item.

cdi:displayLabel.description: A human-readable display label for the object. Supports the use of multiple languages. Repeat for labels with different content, for example, labels with differing length limitations.

cdi:identifier.description: Identifier for objects requiring short- or long-lasting referencing and management.

cdi:levelNumber.description: Provides an association between a level number and optional concept which defines it within an ordered array. Use is required.

LevelStructure.description: Nesting structure of a hierarchical collection.

cdi:identifier.description: Identifier for objects requiring short- or long-lasting referencing and management.

cdi:name.description: Human understandable name (liguistic signifier, word, phrase, or mnemonic). May follow ISO/IEC 11179-5 naming principles, and have context provided to specify usage.

cdi:usage.description: Explanation of the ways in which the object is employed.

cdi:validDateRange.description: The period for which the level object is valid, expressed as a start and end date (supports both ISO-standard and non-ISO date formats).

Notation.description: Representation of a category in the context of a code or a classification item, as opposed of the corresponding instance value which would appear when used in a dataset.

cdi:content.description: The actual content of this value as a string.

cdi:identifier.description: Identifier for objects requiring short- or long-lasting referencing and management.

cdi:whiteSpace.description: The usual setting "collapse" states that leading and trailing white space will be removed and multiple adjacent white spaces will be treated as a single white space. When setting to "replace" all occurrences of #x9 (tab), #xA (line feed) and #xD (carriage return) are replaced with #x20 (space) but leading and trailing spaces will be retained. If the existence of any of these white spaces is critical to the understanding of the content, change the value of this attribute to "preserve".

TypedString.description: TypedString combines a type with content defined as a simple string. May be used wherever a simple string needs to support a type definition to clarify its content.

cdi:content.description: Content of the property expressed as a simple string.

cdi:typeOfContent.description: Optional use of a controlled vocabulary to specifically type the associated content.
